query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, l.status, l.sentAt, l.digestType, l.projectCount, l.contactCount
FROM users u
JOIN userEmailSendLog l ON l.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email IN ('brett.hansen@sykesgroup.com', 'ryan.pemberton@atlascopco.com')
  AND l.digestType = 'monday'
  AND l.sentAt >= '2026-06-07 00:00:00'
ORDER BY l.sentAt DESC;
